nodes.name: benchmark.sh
nodes.summary: Runs performance benchmarks for Avelo with configurable test modes (core, million-scale stress test variants) and environment isolation.

nodes.name: bootstrap.sh
nodes.summary: Initial setup script that verifies toolchain (Xcode, Swift), builds debug package, runs tests, assembles signed app bundle, and guides developers through post-bootstrap steps.
nodes.languageNotes: Shell script with helper functions for logging and error handling; calls swiftw wrapper and bundle.sh.

nodes.name: log_step
nodes.summary: Formats and prints a numbered progress step message to guide the bootstrap process.

nodes.name: fail_with_hint
nodes.summary: Exits with error code 1 and outputs an error message followed by an optional hint to stderr.

nodes.name: require_command
nodes.summary: Checks if a command exists in PATH; fails with hint if missing.

nodes.name: bundle.sh
nodes.summary: Assembles the macOS application bundle with release/debug configuration, copying binary, resources, and entitlements, then code-signs the final artifact.

nodes.name: bundle_selftest.sh
nodes.summary: Validates the bundled app and runs its built-in self-test mechanism, capturing and reporting success/failure from the executable.

nodes.name: launch_smoke.sh
nodes.summary: Smoke test orchestrator that validates bundle integrity and executes the bundled app self-test.

nodes.name: phase0_evidence.sh
nodes.summary: Diagnostic utility that captures environment metadata (OS version, hardware, app build info, code signature status, Gatekeeper assessment) for audit and debugging.

nodes.name: swift-env.sh
nodes.summary: Environment configuration for isolated Swift/SwiftPM builds, setting up repo-local cache and home directories to avoid system permission issues.
nodes.languageNotes: Sourced by other scripts; exports environment variables and defines avelo_swift_permission_hint helper.

nodes.name: avelo_swift_permission_hint
nodes.summary: Prints helpful error message guiding developers to use repo-local Swift tooling when permission errors occur.

nodes.name: swiftw.sh
nodes.summary: Wrapper for Swift compiler/package manager commands that enforces repo-local build environment, captures output, and hints users when permission errors arise.

nodes.name: validate_bundle.sh
nodes.summary: Validates that an macOS app bundle has all required files (executable, plist, resources), passes code-signature verification, and metadata integrity checks.
